markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 160 — Wheel lift

Any device that may be extended beyond the rear bumper of a tow truck or car carrier for the purpose of towing another vehicle. Such device may also be referred to as an “under lift”.

*Last modified: Oct. 9, 2015*
